headline: RBC Capital Maintains Outperform on Biogen, Raises Price Target to $227
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Brian Abrahams   maintains Biogen (NASDAQ:BIIB) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $222 to $227.

raw.headline: RBC Capital Maintains Outperform on Biogen, Raises Price Target to $227
raw.summary: RBC Capital  analyst Brian Abrahams   maintains Biogen (NASDAQ:BIIB) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $222 to $227.
